content: Deploy-observability section in README (warren-c5a5 / pl-7b06 step 20) lives between '### Continuous deployment from GitHub Actions' and '## Power features (opt-in)'. Documents the operator-visible surface on a live Fly deploy: /healthz + /readyz + /version probes; pino JSON logs gated by WARREN_LOG_LEVEL piped to 'fly logs' or the Fly dashboard Logs tab; X-Request-ID correlation (src/server/request-id.ts, warren-30af) bound into per-request pino child loggers for 'fly logs | jq select(.req_id==...)' triage; per-run cost/token columns (runs.cost_usd, runs.tokens_*) + GET /analytics/cost as reporting (enforcement deferred to R-17); Fly Metrics tab + 'fly status' / 'fly ssh console' for VM and volume state; and 'warren doctor' as the pre-flight check. Explicit non-goal: no built-in Prom/OTel exporter in V1; request-id+pino is the extension seam.
